chunks.text: Natacha Crooks is an Assistant Professor in EECS at UC Berkeley. Contact information: ncrooks@berkeley.edu. Links include Personal Homepage, Publications, and Research Support. Frankie Vasquez: fvasquez@berkeley.edu.
Education: 2019 Ph.D. in Distributed Systems from University of Texas. 2012 BA in Computer Science and Law from University of Cambridge.

Research Areas: Database Management Systems (DBMS) and Operating Systems & Networking (OSNT). Research Centers: Berkeley Center for Responsible, Decentralized Intelligence (RDI) and Sky Computing Lab (Sky).
Teaching Schedule: CS 186 Introduction to Database Systems, MoWe 10:00-11:29, Soda 306.

Selected Honors and Awards: Sloan Research Fellow 2025, IEEE CS TCDE Early Career/Rising Star Award 2024, Okawa Research Grant 2023, VMware Early Career Faculty Award 2022, ACM SIGOPS Dennis M. Ritchie Doctoral Dissertation Award 2020.
